name: Beef with Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Wine, Shaoxing or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine ginger, wine, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Toss beef strips in the mixture and marinate for 30 minutes to several hours.
2. Drain the beef and reserve the marinade. Combine the marinade with enough water to make 1/3 cup.
3. Dissolve cornstarch in this mixture.
4. Heat a wok on high heat and add 1 tablespoon oil. Add beef to the pan; stir-fry until the meat loses its raw color, about 1 minute. Remove the meat from the pan.
5. Add the remaining oil to the wok. Add asparagus and stir-fry over medium heat until heated through. Return the beef to the pan; add the reserved marinade. Increase the heat to high and cook until the sauce thickens.
6. Serve immediately.
VARIATIONS: When asparagus is not in season, sliced Chinese or Western-style broccoli can be used instead. For a richer sauce, reduce soy sauce in the marinade to 1 tablespoon dark soy; add 2 tablespoons oyster sauce to the pan during the last step.
